title: With A Copy Of 'A House Of Pomegranates'
content:
Go, little book,
    To him who, on a lute with horns of pearl,
    Sang of the white feet of the Golden Girl:
    And bid him look
    Into thy pages: it may hap that he
    May find that golden maidens dance through thee.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Oscar Fingal O'Flahertie Wills Wilde delivers a powerful performance in "With A Copy Of 'A House Of Pomegranates'"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
